entries.round: task:The project is currently failing the production build process due to a series of cascading refactoring errors (moving from Sanity to MongoDB, upgrading to Next.js 16/Turbopack rules). Use 'run_bash' to continuously run 'npm run build' and fix EVERY single TypeScript error, import path error, and missing module error until 'npm run build' exits cleanly with code 0. Focus on routing/i18n path resolution, 'next-auth' module errors, Mongoose typing issues, and ensuring 'src/proxy.ts' (formerly middleware.ts) correctly configures i18n and Auth. This is a critical stability task. You have multiple retries; do not stop until the build passes.
